description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top and bottom. The can features a dark background with bold, white script lettering and additional nutritional and informational text in smaller fonts. The top of the can is metallic silver with a pull tab opening mechanism, and the sides display various icons, a barcode, and recycling information. The main label includes large, stylized text and a prominent 'Sabor Original' marking, with smaller details such as a QR code and volume indication. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, typical of aluminum cans. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually striking, with high contrast between the dark background and white text.
description: A sleek, dark aluminum can with bold white script and detailed labeling, featuring a metallic pull tab top. The design is modern, with clear nutritional and recycling information.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows nutritional facts, icons, and a barcode on a dark background.
description_view_1: This side view highlights recycling information, a volume marking, and a partially visible logo.
description_view_2: The front prominently displays large white script text and 'Sabor Original' on a dark background.
description_view_3: This view shows the edge of the main script, a QR code, and additional icons and text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a dark background with bold, flowing white script and block text, accented by smaller icons and informational graphics. The design is high-contrast, modern, and clean, with clear typographic hierarchy and minimalistic iconography.
